calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Jeanne Andaya, Defendant appeared in Propria Persona

Ruling:
No other appearance. Tentative Ruling Adopted. Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $75 per pay period. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
